title: Weeks before Alexander Wang’s AI update tease, Google ‘messaged’ Meta

title: Scientists recover ancient DNA left behind on cave walls for the first time
summary: In an extraordinary breakthrough, researchers have isolated ancient human DNA from prehistoric cave paintings found in Spain and Portugal. The DNA seems to have seeped through bodily fluids, giving us a fascinating link to the artists who crafted these enduring relics thousands of years ago.
